task_yaml.task:
I want to check whether my Outlook mailbox can still be accessed normally on the web.
The login credentials are available as environment variables inside the container:

    $OUTLOOK_URL        — the Outlook web entry URL
    $EMAIL_ADDRESS      — the account email
    $EMAIL_PASSWORD     — the account password

Please use the browser to open Outlook on the web and try signing in with that account.
If Microsoft shows its own email verification, password, or stay-signed-in
pages along the way, follow whichever path can continue into the inbox.

If you can reach the inbox, save one inbox screenshot and a short status note.
If the login ultimately fails, also save a screenshot of the failure page and
a short explanation to `/tmp_workspace/results/` so I can debug it later.

The password is sensitive. Do not write it into `results/`, do not pass it as
a command-line argument, and do not let it appear in screenshots in plain text.

If you can reach the inbox, save one inbox screenshot and a short status note.
